commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh The word of the LORD which came to Jeremiah the prophet against the nations; Gentiles, to whom Jeremias was sent, chap. What follows regards them, (Calmet) if we except the last chapter. (Haydock) It was thought proper to place these predictions here, though out of their chronological order, to which the Septuagint have more adhered, placing them after chap. (Calmet) The punishment of the chief enemies of the Jews is foretold. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
